items.name: Roller Blinds
items.description: Minimal, modern blinds ideal for homes and offices. Easy to operate, available in a wide range of fabrics and opacity levels.

items.name: Vertical Blinds
items.description: Perfect for large windows and sliding patio doors. Offers precise light and privacy control with a clean, professional look.

items.name: Venetian Blinds
items.description: Classic horizontal slat blinds offering precise light control. Available in aluminium, wood, and faux-wood finishes.

items.name: Zebra Blinds
items.description: Dual-layer sheer and solid fabric blinds for flexible, adjustable light filtering — a stylish alternative to conventional blinds.

items.name: Roman Blinds
items.description: Soft, folded fabric blinds that add a warm, structured elegance. Ideal for living rooms, bedrooms, and study spaces.

items.name: Curtains
items.description: Elegant fabric drapes tailored to complement your interiors. Custom-made in a vast selection of fabrics, textures, and colours.

items.name: Ripple Curtains
items.description: Wave-style curtains with uniform, flowing folds for a consistently refined and contemporary look in any room.

items.name: Track Curtains
items.description: Smooth-glide ceiling-mounted curtain track systems for a seamless, floor-to-ceiling look in modern interiors.

items.name: Hospital Curtains
items.description: Durable, hygienic, and antimicrobial curtains designed specifically for hospitals, clinics, and other medical environments.
